What I Offer

Services

Here's how I can help — whether you're a small business, a startup, or someone who needs reliable digital support.

Social Media Ad Management
Set up, run, and monitor Facebook & Instagram ad campaigns. I handle audience targeting, ad budgets, and performance tracking so your business reaches the right people.
Meta Ads Manager Audience Targeting Analytics Content Boosting
Database Setup & Management
Design and manage basic databases for your business or project. From data entry systems to simple query-based reports, I can help structure your data properly.
Database Design SQL Basics Data Entry Systems
Basic UI/UX Wireframing
Create simple wireframes and mockups for apps or websites using Figma. Perfect for visualizing ideas before development or pitching a concept to a client or team.
Figma Wireframing Mockups UX/UI Basics
Tech Setup & Troubleshooting
Assembly and configuration of Piso WiFi, Pisonet, and basic computer systems. I can also assist with general device troubleshooting, hardware checks, and unit testing.
Piso WiFi / Pisonet Hardware Assembly Troubleshooting Unit Testing
Document & Report Preparation
Create professional documents, spreadsheets, and reports using Microsoft Word and Excel. Great for business records, school requirements, and simple data presentations.
Microsoft Word Microsoft Excel Canva Formatting
IT Support & System Analysis
Assist with identifying system needs, gathering basic requirements, and recommending practical digital solutions for small businesses or student projects.
System Analysis Requirements Gathering IT Consulting

BS Information Systems
About Me

Driven by curiosity,
shaped by experience.

I'm a second-year Bachelor of Information Systems student at Davao del Norte State College, bringing a strong academic foundation from Tubod National High School where I specialized in ICT-Computer System Servicing.

Beyond academics, I've worked hands-on — from assembling Piso WiFi units and troubleshooting tech setups, to managing Meta ad campaigns for a local e-bike brand. I've also spent years in construction and agricultural labor, which built my discipline, resilience, and teamwork.

I'm passionate about creating efficient system solutions and continuously expanding my technical skill set to contribute meaningfully to the IT industry.

English — Fluent Filipino — Fluent Japanese — Basic
Work Experience

What I've Built & Done

2025 – Present
Digital Marketing Assistant
Nakayama E-Bike Trading
  • Managed Meta (Facebook & Instagram) ad campaigns
  • Monitored ad performance and basic analytics dashboards
  • Supported content boosting and audience targeting setup
  • Helped optimize ad reach and engagement based on objectives
88 Hours OJT
OJT Trainee
PCBYTE — Piso WiFi / Pisonet / Carwash Setup
  • Assembled and set up Piso WiFi and Pisonet units from scratch
  • Performed unit testing and basic device troubleshooting
  • Handled customer interaction and explained services/products
  • Organized tools, equipment, and materials on-site
2019 – 2024
Laborer / Field Worker
Construction & Agricultural Work
  • Performed construction-related manual labor tasks
  • Assisted in banana plant box assembly and cargo handling
  • Participated in vegetable harvesting operations
  • Demonstrated strong physical endurance, teamwork, and discipline
